entries.purpose: Server-side live checkout session creation, payment reconciliation, and Stripe API access for Local No. 001.
entries.notes: Created date reflects the first confirmed live launch-window use recorded in ops, not necessarily the provider-issued creation time.

entries.purpose: Client-visible Stripe Checkout initialization on autonomousorganization.io.
